HomeFAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers about our warranty, returns, shipping, and mango refund policy. If you need more help, our team is available around the clock.

Shipping

Yes, we deliver across Pakistan with orchard-fresh packaging. International shipping is available on select orders.

Returns

Contact us within 24 hours with photos and we will arrange a replacement or refund.

Products

Yes, every mango is hand-selected and graded for export quality from Multan and Sindh orchards.

Quick Service On Emergency Call — 24/7

Need urgent help with your order, delivery, or refund? Our mango specialists are one call away.

+92 307 3970850

E Royal Mango delivers Pakistan's finest export-quality mangoes — handpicked from Multan's legendary orchards with royal care.
